'''''Ewoks'' 12''' is the twelfth issue of [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|Marvel's ''Ewoks'']] series of comic books. It was published under the [[Marvel Comics]] [[Star Comics]] imprint on [[December 2]], [[1986]] with a cover date of [[March]] [[1987]]. It contained the story "'''The Thorn Monster'''."
